channel.title: Methodic Truth — Chronicles & Changelog
channel.description: Field notes from building an AI agent from scratch, plus everything shipped on methodictruth.com, in the order it happened.

item.title: Changelog: June 30, 2026
item.description: Fixed the Song Analyzer failing through the live service while passing every manual test — the worker's output piping into journald was blocking yt-dlp's progress writes and freezing the download. Added a cross-process concurrency limit so simultaneous requests queue instead of dogpiling. Cut a fresh analysis from ~20s to ~12s, and made the embedded player load in parallel with the analysis.

item.title: It Worked Everywhere Except Where It Ran
item.description: The Song Analyzer passed every test by hand and failed only through the installed service. The bug wasn't the code, the network, or YouTube — it was the worker's output pipe to journald applying backpressure and freezing the download mid-transfer.

item.title: Changelog: June 29, 2026
item.description: Added Song Analyzer and Fretboard to the Music nav dropdown. Fixed the gunicorn deployment on the physical Song Analyzer host (it was never actually installed). Made the host survive a real reboot — WSL2 auto-starts at Windows boot and the machine no longer sleeps. Added optional cookie support so yt-dlp can ride past YouTube's bot-check block.

item.title: What Real Hardware Costs You
item.description: A day after the Song Analyzer started doing real audio analysis on real hardware, that hardware proved it: gunicorn was never actually installed, WSL2 doesn't survive a Windows reboot on its own, and YouTube started blocking the requests outright.

item.title: Real Chords, Real Hardware
item.description: The Song Analyzer stopped faking it — a real audio-analysis pipeline now runs on a physical machine behind a Cloudflare Tunnel, hardened with caching, gunicorn, and a dedup lock.

item.title: Changelog: June 27, 2026
item.description: Added a searchable directory of every tool and page, a skip-to-content link and better keyboard support across the site, and the changelog. Filled in missing page descriptions and gave the site a proper 404 page. Moved the step sequencer into the synth itself. Made the ambient atmosphere calmer. Fixed the mobile hamburger nav dropdown. Added a Jam Guide, FM synthesis, an AI Dispatches feed, an Ear Training tool, a generalized Chord-Tone Trainer, a rhyme finder and syllable counter in Songwriter, a Rhythm Trainer drill, algorithmic chord voicings, and improved Theory piano legibility.

item.title: Changelog: June 26, 2026
item.description: Stopped the generative ambient music from autoplaying and hid the music player bar site-wide. Fixed the SPA router breaking onclick handlers on navigated pages.

item.title: The Inference Layer
item.description: How we built a free local AI inference tier across two machines — a gaming GPU and an Apple Silicon chip — and what it means to own your own compute.

item.title: Changelog: May 2026
item.description: Connected a second GPU node to the AI agent network with live inference. General site cleanup — fixed broken asset references, added a favicon.

item.title: The Platform That Changed the Rules
item.description: Anthropic revoked third-party OAuth for 135,000 OpenClaw instances with less than 24 hours notice.

item.title: Presenting the Network
item.description: Six machines, one encrypted mesh, one AI gateway. A clear picture of what comes next.

item.title: Four Nodes Online
item.description: The network grows: four machines connected to a private mesh, each becoming a cognitive node.

item.title: The Network Becomes a Mind
item.description: Six nodes on a private mesh. Abstracting the network as agents. Five possible architectures.

item.title: Changelog: April 10, 2026
item.description: Published The Network — a live map of the distributed AI infrastructure: remote access mesh, OS icons, character avatars for each node. Moved Network into the Systems menu.

item.title: Changelog: April 1, 2026
item.description: Added the Chord Voicings tool, tuned audio latency and keyboard responsiveness in the synth, and fixed real-time parameter changes in the Signal analyzer.

item.title: Changelog: March 30–31, 2026
item.description: Added the Song Analyzer — chord, key, and tempo detection from a YouTube link — connected it to a Cloudflare Worker backend, and gave it a dark, Byzantine aesthetic. Stabilized the synth's audio engine.

item.title: Infrastructure Evolution
item.description: Remote access, OAuth auth migration, and building a distributed gateway architecture across meshed machines.
